response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with deep experience in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, but lacks the core requirements for this role. Professional C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015, far short of the required 5–10 years on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background.
strengths: Seasoned senior engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing)
Excellent written and verbal communication, evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience — only a brief stint at National Instruments, no recent C++ work
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB, MySQL, generic SQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
